title: ctenitis pedicellata
intro: Ctenitis pedicellata, also known as the Ctenitis fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis pedicellata are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Ctenitis pedicellata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component of various formulas to enhance its medicinal effects.
